title: Transaction Lifecycle in SQL
description: A flowchart depicting the states a SQL transaction progresses through, from its beginning to its final commit or rollback.
relationships: BEGIN TRANSACTION leads to Active State
Active State can lead to Partially Committed State (if operations succeed) or Failed State (if error occurs)
Partially Committed State leads to Committed State after write to disk
Failed State leads to Terminated State after Rollback
Committed and Terminated are final states
